title: Elytra Bombing
description: Drop TNT or anvils when flying with the elytra.
body:
#### This mod adds the ability to drop TNT or anvils when in flight.

If you hold both a TNT and a flint and steel, you will be able to drop a primed TNT. \
If you hold an anvil, you will be able to drop an anvil falling block.

#### Support
I will only support Fabric. I'm not interested in spending effort to port to other loaders. Feel free to do this yourself.

*Note:* I had this idea for years but only implemented it in 2022. I didn't know at the time that there was a Forge mod with the exact same idea at the time.
